com.pax.poslink

Class PaymentRequest.HostGateWay

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.HostGateWay
  • Enclosing class:

    public static class PaymentRequest.HostGateWay
extends java.lang.Object

      Modifier and Type Field and Description

      The card type, refer to the Card Type Definition
      Required for Multi Token Pay trans for some hosts.

      The customized data can be used to generate customized billing or reports etc … for the merchant.

      The customized data can be used to generate customized billing or reports etc … for the merchant.

      Token value.

      Send token request indicator to host to request token

      It is used to specify the serial number for the account where the card token is stored.

    • Field Detail

      • HRef

        public java.lang.String HRef
        Host reference number (Transaction UID). This field is host dependent; it can be used to run Void/Return transactions.

        Attribute: ans..32

      • GatewayId

        public java.lang.String GatewayId
        Gateway ID.

        Attribute: ans..64

      • TokenRequestFlag

        public java.lang.String TokenRequestFlag
        Send token request indicator to host to request token

        “1”- YES
        “0”- NO
        The default value is “0”.
        Whether the token is being returned depends on whether the host returns the token. It is acceptable to return a token with this field being set to “0”. So is the same oppositely

        Attribute: n1

      • Token

        public java.lang.String Token
        Token value.

        Attribute: ans..128

      • CardType

        public java.lang.String CardType
        The card type, refer to the Card Type Definition
        Required for Multi Token Pay trans for some hosts.

        Attribute: n2

      • PassThruData

        public java.lang.String PassThruData
        Passthru data.

        Attribute: ans..1024

      • ReturnReason

        public java.lang.String ReturnReason
        Reason For RETURN.

        0 means general return.
        1 means adjustment.
        If the Host require this mandatory field, Default value of 0 will be send.

        Attribute: n1

      • StationId

        public java.lang.String StationId
        Station number/LaneID, StationID, RegisterID

        Attribute: ans..8

      • GlobalUid

        public java.lang.String GlobalUid
        An unique ID for each transaction.

        Attribute: ans..64

      • CustomizeData1

        public java.lang.String CustomizeData1
        The customized data can be used to generate customized billing or reports etc … for the merchant.

        Attribute: ans…800

      • CustomizeData2

        public java.lang.String CustomizeData2
        The customized data can be used to generate customized billing or reports etc … for the merchant.

        Attribute: ans…800

      • CustomizeData3

        public java.lang.String CustomizeData3
        The customized data can be used to generate customized billing or reports etc … for the merchant.

        Attribute: ans…800

      • EwicDiscountAmount

        public java.lang.String EwicDiscountAmount
        This is only applicable when a transaction is a eWIC type. It is used as a discount or coupon.

        Attribute: n...9

      • TokenSerialNum

        public java.lang.String TokenSerialNum
        It is used to specify the serial number for the account where the card token is stored.

        Attribute: ans..10

      • StatementDescriptor

        public java.lang.String StatementDescriptor
        Allows merchants to add a dynamic suffix value to a shortened version of the merchant DBA (Doing Business As) name for each transaction. This can help explain charges on the cardholder's bank statements by specifying details about the product, service, or payment causing a reduction in chargebacks and disputes by providing a clear understanding of purchases on customer’s statements. Example: If this field is set to “Store #1234” then it may appear on the statement as MerchantDBA*Store #1234.

        Attribute: ans..15

      • HostGateWay

        public HostGateWay()
